cnbc.title: Tesla misses on earnings, as free cash flow turns negative and margins slide
cnbc.summary: Tesla's earnings report lands in the midst of a slide in the company's stock price even as its core auto business is rebounding.

cnbc.title: IBM lowers full-year forecast after earnings warning
cnbc.summary: IBM is now looking to improve productivity with artificial intelligence, including with a new coding tool called Bob.

cnbc.title: Oil prices rise after Rubio says Iran is not serious about a deal
cnbc.summary: The U.S. has launched strikes against Iran for 11 consecutive days, citing a need to "degrade Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping."

cnbc.title: U.S. signs nuclear power agreement with Saudi Arabia
cnbc.summary: The agreement will provide U.S. companies with access to Saudi Arabia's nuclear energy program, the Department of Energy said.

cnbc.title: OpenAI cyber models broke out of training environment to hack Hugging Face
cnbc.summary: The incident is unique because it was "driven, end to end, by an autonomous AI agent system," according to Hugging Face.

cnbc.title: Trump vows to bomb Iran's bridges, power plants if it shoots at ships in Hormuz Strait
cnbc.summary: He issued his threat after U.S. Central Command hit Iranian targets for an 11th straight night.

cnbc.title: Southwest Airlines' third-quarter forecast falls short as fuel bill climbs
cnbc.summary: Southwest Airlines reported a more than 9% increase in second-quarter profit as higher fares are increasingly helping the airline cover its fuel tab.

cnbc.title: Analysis: Iran war energy shock hits the U.S. economy as gas and diesel prices climb
cnbc.summary: A new asymmetry in the market means fuel prices won't fall quickly even if the shooting in the Iran war and Strait of Hormuz stops.

cnbc.title: U.S. Secret Service official: 'Threat environment is the highest we've ever seen'
cnbc.summary: The Secret Service has seen a 40% increase this year in cases involving threats to protectees, including President Donald Trump.

cnbc.summary: Attacks on ships transiting the Bab el-Mandeb threaten to cut off millions of barrels per day of Saudi crude oil exports.
